_doc: Per-page data and slot requirements for the diversity atlas. Round-1 ships every page reading exclusively from the embedded_tables.json snapshot loaded by atlases/diversity/shared/data_loader.js — no layer is registered, no slot is required. Registry-content decisions (requires_layers / requires_slots / preloads) are owned by Quentin and out-of-scope for migration rounds, per the architectural-discipline rule established in the inversion atlas round-5-step-17 handoff.

page1._label: samples — per-sample master table + 5 distribution/relationship plots
page1._doc: Reads D.globals, D.S1, D.S9, D.ST2. Click-row drill-down for sample detail panel.

page2._doc: Reads D.ST1, D.S4, D.S6, D.SZ, D.globals.

page3._label: hotspots — 19 θπ outlier windows + per-sample × per-window heatmap

page4._label: ancestry — K=8 stratified F_ROH/H tests + K-sweep trajectory
page4._doc: Reads D.S5_kw, D.S5_pair, D.S9, D.S7, D.S10, D.S1, D.globals.

page5._label: ROH composition — length-class bins (S8), per-chrom heatmap (S8b), S12 het in/out, S8c long tracts
page5._doc: Reads D.S8, D.S8b, D.S1, D.S4, D.SD4, D.S12, D.S12_summary, D.S8c_long.

page6._label: pruning & QC — NAToRA (S11), ngsF-HMM (SZ), Spearman matrix (S3), het in/out (S1)
page6._doc: Reads D.S11, D.SZ, D.S3, D.S1, D.S9, D.globals.

page7._label: about — headline numbers, MODULE_3 methods (SD1-SD8), coverage map, placeholder/real-data cards (S4b, ST4, ST5, REF)
page7._doc: Reads D.globals, D.SD1..D.SD8, D.S4b, D.S4b_meta, D.ST4_meta, D.ST5, D.ST5_meta, D.REF, D.REF_meta.

page8._label: roadmap — static narrative of what's shipped vs. planned
page8._doc: Pure static fragment, no data reads.

page9._label: texture — per-sample DDI × H scatter + per-window H strip (χ_min marker)
page9._doc: Reads D.S1, D.S9, and the optional D.WIN_METRICS payload (texture_metrics.json). Renders a 'data pending' card when the texture payload is absent or empty. Substrate produced by catfish-diversity-analysis phase_2_discovery/04_window_H_and_DDI.sh (to be written).

page10._label: burden — functional burden / selection efficacy (5 layers + variant inventory + transcript view + MSA panel)
page10._doc: Reads D.S1, D.S9, and the optional ctx.FUNCTIONAL_BURDEN payload (functional_burden.json). Stratified by K=8 / family / sample / F_ROH-quartile via shared/stratification.js. Five layers: VESM deleterious burden, πN/πS, π0/π4, LOF count, ROH-overlap fraction. Variant inventory follows the black-grouse Nature 2024 Fig 2c snpEff impact-class style. GERP panel is off by default (no upstream track yet). Renders 'data pending' card when functional_burden.json is empty.

page11._label: divergence — pairwise group-divergence network (FST / DXY / dA)
page11._doc: Reads D.S1, D.S9, and the optional ctx.DIVERGENCE_NETWORK payload (divergence_network.json). Node-link plot with circular default layout (force-directed toggle); edges = pairwise FST (default) / DXY / dA between K=8 groups. Customisable edge filter (Show all / Top-N / Significant only) via a caret menu in the panel header. Renders 'data pending' card when divergence_network.json is empty.
